source: ADR-0005 B1 — DAMA Wheel cross-reference per page
outOfScopeDisclaimer: OPDA explicitly disclaims KA #4 (Data Storage & Operations, except trust-registry ops) and KA #9 (Data Warehousing & BI, except meta-analytics outputs). KA #7 (Document & Content Management) was reassessed in scope per ADR-0001.

pages.rationale: Error page; no DAMA KA fits
Market-adoption narrative (headline numbers, integration spectrum) — describes uptake of the standard, not a data-management activity
HMLR's national LLC register is a public-sector master-data programme; PDTF's llc1.json aligns to it as authoritative reference data
Section landing — no specific KA
Roster of what each member firm has shipped; market-adoption evidence, not a data-management activity
Describes the operational Sandbox programme — pilot delivery vehicle, not a DAMA-mappable workstream in itself
Programme/award archive; market evidence rather than DAMA-mapped activity
Site UI design tokens — internal site styling, no DAMA KA applies
Operational map of governing forums (DPMSG, working groups) — Data Governance KA covers cross-stakeholder coordination
Section landing — no specific KA
Decision log and meeting archive — governance audit trail with archived materials (recordkeeping aspect maps to D&CM)
Unstructured transcript corpus indexed for search — classic D&CM territory per ADR-0001 reassessment
Public video archive with transcripts — unstructured-media management
Working-group remit and structure — the federation governance machinery
Acronyms and key terms used across UK property data — business glossary is core Metadata Management
Maturity-scored directory of accredited firms with capability scores — governance accountability surface plus DQ-derived scoring (meta-analytics carve-out also relevant per ADR-0001)
Constitutional and schema-change pathways with approval authorities — governance change-control
Accreditation/certification scheme — governance compliance regime with DQ pass-fail proving
Six DQ dimensions (accuracy, completeness, etc.) per claim type — the canonical DAMA KA #11
KYC/KYB, DID key management, signature verification, revocation, audit logging — the canonical DAMA KA #5
Domain Data Stewards, RACI, voting machinery — core Data Governance KA
UK government departments authorising/regulating the initiative — external governance context
Section landing — no specific KA
Statutes (DMCC, DUA, Leasehold Reform) that authorise OPDA's mandate — regulatory governance backbone
Semantic versioning, deprecation timelines, retirement — governance lifecycle policy with metadata aspects (release register)
AGM/Board rhythm, decision retention, feedback SLAs — governance operating model
Member-firm constitution and certified-roster — governance participant register
Handling policy for unstructured overlay attachments (TA10 plans, EPCs, photos) — D&CM is the canonical KA for this strand per ADR-0001 Wave 2
Liability framework for participants in the federation — governance risk allocation
